fields.name: Strawberries (Orchard View)
fields.description: Freshly picked strawberries, sweet and juicy from our local farm. Perfect for desserts, smoothies, or simply enjoyed on their own.

fields.name: Organic Carrots
fields.description: Freshly harvested organic Chantenay carrots, grown without pesticides. Sweet and tender, perfect for roasting or juicing.

fields.name: Organic Tomatoes
fields.description: Vine-ripened organic tomatoes, rich in flavour. Hand-picked daily from our polytunnels. Ideal for salads, sauces, and slow-roasting.

fields.name: Courgettes
fields.description: Tender organic courgettes, harvested young for the best flavour. Versatile in stir-fries, pasta dishes, or simply grilled with olive oil.

fields.name: Salad Potatoes
fields.description: Creamy Nicola salad potatoes, excellent boiled, roasted, or in potato salads. Consistent, smooth-skinned, and full of flavour.

fields.name: Red Onions
fields.description: Mild, sweet red onions straight from our fields. Great raw in salads, caramelised in a pan, or slow-roasted whole.

fields.name: Organic Lettuce
fields.description: Crisp organic butterhead lettuce, freshly cut. A staple for any salad lover. Grown in our open fields with no artificial inputs.

fields.name: Stored Potatoes
fields.description: Classic Maris Piper baking and chipping potatoes, stored from our autumn harvest. Available year-round and perfect for every cooking method.

fields.name: Mixed Salad Leaves
fields.description: A seasonal blend of rocket, mizuna, spinach, and mustard leaves. Harvested fresh each morning and ready to eat straight from the bag.

fields.name: Butternut Squash
fields.description: Dense and sweet butternut squash from our autumn crop. Perfect for soups, roasting, or stuffed as a centrepiece dish.

fields.name: Fresh Apples
fields.description: Crisp Cox and Bramley apples, hand-picked from our heritage orchard. A classic British apple, great for eating, baking, and juicing.

fields.name: Strawberries
fields.description: Sweet, locally grown organic strawberries, picked at peak ripeness. Available June to August — the taste of summer.

fields.name: Conference Pears
fields.description: Juicy, perfectly ripe Conference pears from our orchard. Long-keeping variety, ideal for eating fresh or poaching in spiced wine.

fields.name: Organic Free Range Eggs
fields.description: Fresh organic eggs from free-range hens, collected daily. Our hens roam open pastures and are fed a certified organic diet. Rich, deep-yellow yolks.

fields.name: Fresh Whole Milk
fields.description: Unhomogenised whole milk from our grass-fed Friesian herd, bottled daily at the farm. Creamy, fresh, and full of natural goodness.

fields.name: Mature Cheddar Cheese
fields.description: Traditionally made mature cheddar, aged for 12 months in our cellars. A robust, nutty flavour with a crumbly texture.

fields.name: Natural Yoghurt
fields.description: Thick, creamy natural set yoghurt made from our fresh whole milk. Live cultures, no additives or sweeteners. Perfect with fruit, granola, or savoury dishes.

fields.name: Double Cream
fields.description: Rich, indulgent double cream from our Jersey-Friesian cross herd. 48% butterfat for the most luxurious whipping or pouring cream.

fields.name: Soft Goat's Cheese
fields.description: Fresh, mild soft goat's cheese from our small herd of Saanen goats. Beautifully spreadable with a clean, lightly tangy flavour.

fields.name: Walnut Bread
fields.description: A rustic sourdough loaf packed with whole walnuts and a hint of honey. Baked fresh each morning in our wood-fired oven.

fields.name: Sourdough Loaf
fields.description: Classic white sourdough made from a 20-year-old starter. Long fermented for great flavour and a chewy, open crumb with a crackling crust.

fields.name: Seeded Batch Loaf
fields.description: Soft, pillowy batch loaf topped with sunflower seeds, pumpkin seeds, and sesame. Made with stoneground wholemeal flour from a local mill.

fields.name: Blueberry Muffins
fields.description: Light, fluffy muffins bursting with fresh blueberries. Baked in small batches using free-range eggs and locally milled flour.

fields.name: Strawberry Jam
fields.description: Traditional whole-fruit strawberry jam made in small batches. Low sugar, high fruit content — nothing artificial.

fields.name: Apple Chutney
fields.description: A rich, tangy chutney made from Cox apples, onions, and warming spices. Perfect with cheese, cold cuts, or a ploughman's lunch.

fields.name: Wildflower Honey
fields.description: Raw, unfiltered wildflower honey from our hives on the edge of the Mendip Hills. Lightly floral with a smooth, lingering sweetness.

fields.name: Pork Sausages
fields.description: Traditional pork sausages made from our own Gloucester Old Spot pigs. Coarsely ground with sage and black pepper. 70% pork content.

fields.name: Free Range Chicken
fields.description: Whole free-range chicken from our slow-growth Hubbard breed. Raised outdoors on pasture. Dressed and ready for the oven.

fields.name: Purple Sprouting Broccoli
fields.description: Tender shoots of purple sprouting broccoli, the true taste of late winter. Harvested early morning for maximum freshness. Steam, stir-fry, or roast.

fields.name: Pumpkin
fields.description: Large Crown Prince pumpkins from our autumn harvest, stored under cover for winter use. Exceptional in soups and curries.

fields.note: Perfect condition, harvest fresh — must sell to avoid waste.
Slight cosmetic blemishes but great flavour. Ideal for cooking.

fields.special_instructions: Delivery to kitchen entrance, contact kitchen manager

fields.title: Out of Stock: Purple Sprouting Broccoli
fields.body: Purple Sprouting Broccoli has reached 0 250g bunch. Customers can see the product but cannot order it. Restock to re-enable purchasing.

fields.title: Beautiful wildflower honey
fields.body: Wonderful floral notes. Perfect on toast and in tea.

fields.title: Lovely free range eggs
fields.body: Rich yolks, great for baking. Consistent quality.

fields.title: Excellent quality
fields.body: Incredibly fresh and flavourful. Perfect for our family salads.

fields.title: Best cheddar in Bristol
fields.body: Rich, mature flavour. Beats anything from the supermarket.

fields.title: Great local milk
fields.body: Creamy and fresh, delivered on time. Will order again.

fields.title: Roasted Root Vegetable Medley
fields.body: A hearty autumn dish featuring our organic carrots, parsnips and potatoes. Toss with olive oil, rosemary and garlic. Roast at 200C for 40 minutes. Finish with a drizzle of local honey for a caramelised glaze.

fields.title: Spring Planting at Bristol Valley Farm
fields.body: This week we started planting our early season lettuces and salad leaves. The mild Bristol spring means we can get a head start on the season. We use companion planting with marigolds to keep pests away naturally.

fields.title: How to Store Dairy Products
fields.body: Keep milk at 1-4C and use within 3 days of delivery for best freshness. Hard cheeses like our cheddar can be wrapped in wax paper and refrigerated for up to 2 weeks. Yoghurt keeps well sealed for 5-7 days.

fields.title: Perfect Sourdough Toast with Local Honey
fields.body: Slice our sourdough thick (2cm), toast until golden. Spread with good butter and drizzle with Hartcliffe wildflower honey. A simple breakfast that showcases the best of Bristol produce.
